title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Leela Palaces - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Leela Palaces - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Leela Palaces are looking for an experienced Reservation Manager based out of Lucknow. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Leela Palaces:
Leela Palaces is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in OTA Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Leela Palaces!
